name: workspace-delete
prompt: add a delete-workspace button to the team settings page
notes: input_tokens=32 is the fresh prompt-only tokens. cache_creation_input_tokens=52090 is first-read codebase context. cache_read_tokens=863184 is subsequent cached reads. The pre-estimate of ~6,800 input_tokens in the presentation script assumed a much smaller demo repo. Actual: 49 contracts + full Next.js + Prisma + Stripe + Mailchimp (800k+ tokens total context at this call). Tool call count: 13 actual vs ~19 estimate — lower because DEMO-SETUP.md provides orientation, and the workspace task mirrors the account task structurally. Baseline is valid for the delta claim.
